content.full_text:
November 20, 1990

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Attn: Legal Division
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Sir or Madam:

Please be advised that I am the City Attorney for the City of Westminster.

Councilmember Gillespie has asked this office to determine as to whether a conflict of interest exists in the following situation.

The Redevelopment Agency for the City of Westminster is in the process of developing a new redevelopment area called Amendment No. 4 which will set forth a given designated area which will establish a new redevelopment project area.

Councilmember Gillespie has indicated that she resides in a condominium complex which has property which borders the back of a river channel which is proposed to be included in Amendment No. 4.

At this time, I would make a general note that her vote and her interest with respect to this property in the river channel is no different than any other property owner city wide with respect to this particular river channel at this time.

I seek advice as to whether a conflict of interest exists and whether we need to have her declare the conflict.

Thank you for your anticipated cooperation in this matter.

Very truly yours,

RICHARD D. JONES

RDJ:kjf
(file: w-ra-ld)
